response.justification: Despite extensive software experience, the candidate lacks direct C++ development in industrial automation, secure coding per IEC 62443, or cloud-based industrial platform work—core requirements for this role. Their work is predominantly in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with only a brief, isolated C++ exposure from 2014–2015 at National Instruments, insufficient to justify senior C++ architecture responsibilities.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across diverse technologies and domains
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication via workshops/talks
Proven ability to lead and mentor through code katas, courses, and team initiatives
concerns: No recent or substantial C++ experience beyond 2015; lacks modern C++/STL/OO in production
No demonstrated exposure to industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or SDL
Lacks experience with industrial protocols (Modbus, OPC UA, MQTT in automation context)

key_factors.factor: Absence of industrial automation domain experience
No IEC 62443 or secure development lifecycle exposure
